stemHtml:
Given the following NOTAM, are you able to fly passengers into EUAD on a charter flight?

Q EGTT/QAZCA/IV/NBO/AE/000/022/5334N00021W003 A EUAD B FROM: 15/12/08 09:42 C TO: PERM E AERODROME ATZ ACTIVE 0620-2115 DAILY. AD OPEN, ATS AVBL, USE OF THE AD IS PRIOR PERMISSION REQUIRED 0620-0630 UTC FOR NON SKED MOVEMENTS. EUAD AD 2.3 AND AD 2.17 REFER

options.a: Yes, but you need prior permission between 06:20-21:15.
options.b: Yes, but you must file a flight plan before departing, at least two hours before the scheduled arrival time.
options.c: Yes, you can fly in at any time between 06:20-21:15 UTC daily.
options.d: Yes, you can fly in at any time after 06:30 UTC, PPR for flights between 06:20 and 06:30 UTC.
